mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points within a single month signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate equity sell-offs and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 60% of threshold-crossing events or t-statistic for return difference is insignificant at 95% confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand growth, which sustains corporate earnings momentum and drives positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth periods yield negative median forward returns or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in OLS regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in the index of industrial production indicate immediate supply-side bottlenecks and falling factory utilization, causing short-term equity price declines as earnings expectations are downgraded.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power during late-cycle phases with Rank IC below 0.01 or positive return frequency exceeds 58%.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation falls below 2.0% while the federal funds rate remains near zero, markets price in prolonged accommodative policy, generating positive forward equity returns as real yields stay compressed.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative in over 55% of threshold activations or signal decays within 10 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate revenue growth and yields positive equity returns over three months.
failure_condition: Payroll growth shows zero correlation with forward returns or Rank IC remains negative across all rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining housing starts and rising retail sales indicates consumers are substituting durable housing purchases with discretionary spending, signaling demand fragility that triggers negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Divergence periods produce positive median forward returns or interaction effect fails significance testing at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with stable inflation confirms healthy capacity utilization without price pressures, prompting short-term equity rallies as investors anticipate margin expansion.
failure_condition: Signal generates negative forward returns in over 60% of activations during early-cycle phases or loses predictive edge after 3 trading days.
